items.description: The info-beamer hosted operating system gets a release. All existing Pi models, back to even the Pi 1 are still fully supported.

items.title: info-beamer pi 1.0.0 released
items.description: info-beamer pi 1.0.0 adds official Pi4 support to info-beamer pi.

items.title: Pi4 dual display/4K and HEVC/H265 support
items.description: info-beamer hosted is the world's first digital signage solution for the Pi4 with dual display support, 4K display support and now HEVC/H265 video decoding with a resolution of up to 4K.

items.title: The 35C3 info beamer setup
items.description: As is tradition, I've been running the info screens at the anual 35C3 conference again.
